message:
test(core): add test isolation for bearer token env var and fix config assertions

- Add TEST_ENV_OVERRIDES thread-local for isolated token env var control
  in tests, preventing cross-test pollution
- Add EnvVarGuard helper to automatically reset env overrides on drop
- Update token-resolution tests to use EnvVarGuard for isolation:
  resolve_token_generates_when_no_source, resolve_token_reads_env_file,
  resolve_token_env_file_quoted_values, resolve_token_env_file_single_quoted,
  resolve_token_empty_explicit_falls_through
- Fix allow_absolute_attachment_paths config test assertion (was asserting
  true, should be false for default)
- Add #[cfg(test)] to normalize_remote_first_two (test-only utility)
- Relax intern_count test assertion to handle parallel test interner sharing

Tests now run reliably in parallel without env var pollution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
